title: EXODUS RECOVERY SERVICES - 211info
text: EXODUS BEHAVORIAL HEALTH SERVICES SPRINGFIELD EXODUS RECOVERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment and recovery services for substance use disorder. Offers DUII and outpatient services designed to comply with services mandates. Also offers individual counseling, group therapy, and other licensed behavioral health services. 5105 Main Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Serves age 8 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 998-5660 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 998-5660 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts private insurance, Medicaid, and offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Harrisburg, Springfield, and Sweet Home Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Group Counseling Individual Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
